Operation 'getStats' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. The current description is identical to the summary and lacks specificity about what statistics are returned, what they measure, and whether authentication is required. An AI agent needs to understand what metrics are available (e.g., email count, storage usage, attachment statistics) to determine if this operation meets their needs. The improved description clarifies the operation's purpose, expected output structure, and access requirements for better AI agent interpretability.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves statistical information about the email archive, including metrics such as total emails archived, storage usage, attachment counts, and other system-level statistics. Returns a statistics object containing aggregated data about the archived emails and system state. No authentication required.
data.reasoning: The current description is identical to the summary and lacks specificity about what statistics are returned, what they measure, and whether authentication is required. An AI agent needs to understand what metrics are available (e.g., email count, storage usage, attachment statistics) to determine if this operation meets their needs. The improved description clarifies the operation's purpose, expected output structure, and access requirements for better AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'listEmails' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is too minimal and repetitive. Added details about pagination support, filtering capabilities, return structure, and authentication requirement to help AI agents understand filtering options and result format.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve paginated list of archived emails
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of archived emails with optional filtering and sorting. Supports filtering by sender, recipient, subject, date range, and other criteria. Returns an array of Email objects with pagination metadata. Requires bearer token authentication.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal and repetitive. Added details about pagination support, filtering capabilities, return structure, and authentication requirement to help AI agents understand filtering options and result format.

message: Operation 'getEmail' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is adequate but description lacks specificity about what 'details' means. Added clarity about the EmailDetail schema, what information is included (metadata, body, headers, attachments), and authentication requirement.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves complete details for a specific archived email by ID. Returns an EmailDetail object containing full email metadata, body content, headers, and associated attachments. Requires bearer token authentication.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description lacks specificity about what 'details' means. Added clarity about the EmailDetail schema, what information is included (metadata, body, headers, attachments), and authentication requirement.

message: Operation 'deleteEmail' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear but description lacks critical information about permanence, side effects (attachment deletion), and response format. Added warnings about irreversibility and clarification of what gets deleted to help AI agents understand the destructive nature of this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes an archived email from the system by ID. This action is irreversible and removes the email and all associated attachments. Requires bearer token authentication. Returns success confirmation.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description lacks critical information about permanence, side effects (attachment deletion), and response format. Added warnings about irreversibility and clarification of what gets deleted to help AI agents understand the destructive nature of this operation.

message: Operation 'getEmailRaw' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is good but description needs context about format details and use cases. Added explanation of EML/MIME format, return type (plain text), and common use cases to help AI agents understand when to use this endpoint versus getEmail.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the raw email message in EML (MIME) format for a specific archived email. Returns the complete email source including headers and body as plain text. Useful for email parsing, forwarding, or archival purposes. Requires bearer token authentication.
data.reasoning: Summary is good but description needs context about format details and use cases. Added explanation of EML/MIME format, return type (plain text), and common use cases to help AI agents understand when to use this endpoint versus getEmail.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all attachments associated with a specific archived email. Returns an array of Attachment objects containing metadata such as filename, size, and MIME type. Requires bearer token authentication.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description lacks details about return structure and attachment metadata. Added specificity about what Attachment objects contain and authentication requirement for better AI agent understanding.

data.description_suggestion: Downloads a specific attachment from an archived email. Returns the attachment file with appropriate content-type header and filename. Requires both email_id and attachment_id parameters. Requires bearer token authentication.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description lacks details about response format and parameter requirements. Added clarity about content-type handling, filename preservation, and both required parameters to help AI agents construct proper requests.

data.description_suggestion: Performs full-text search across all archived emails using the provided query string. Searches email subject, body, sender, and recipient fields.
